subject: Sunday dinner?
snippet: I made a big pot of green chile stew and would love to have you and Sofia over Sunday. Your father wants to hear how the
body: I made a big pot of green chile stew and would love to have you and Sofia over Sunday. Your father wants to hear how the Santa Fe show planning is coming along too. Let me know what time works.

subject: Re: Sunday dinner?
snippet: Sunday works perfectly, Monday's my studio day so I can actually relax that night. We'll bring a loaf from the co-op bak
body: Sunday works perfectly, Monday's my studio day so I can actually relax that night. We'll bring a loaf from the co-op bakery. Can't wait to catch Dad up on the museum plans.

subject: Dad's checkup went well
snippet: Your father's cardiology follow-up this morning was good, blood pressure is right where it should be. The tomatoes are f
body: Your father's cardiology follow-up this morning was good, blood pressure is right where it should be. The tomatoes are finally coming in too, more than we can eat. Come by soon and take some.

subject: Re: Dad's checkup went well
snippet: That's such a relief, thank you for letting me know right away. I was thinking about him this morning on my Bosque run a
body: That's such a relief, thank you for letting me know right away. I was thinking about him this morning on my Bosque run actually. I'll swing by for tomatoes after my Monday studio day.

subject: Re: Dad's checkup went well
snippet: I'll have Elena drop some tomatoes at the gallery since she's driving that way anyway. How's the kiln loading going this
body: I'll have Elena drop some tomatoes at the gallery since she's driving that way anyway. How's the kiln loading going this week? Your father keeps asking if the new vessels are holding up in there.

subject: Water Memory - sales update
snippet: Two of Sarah's pieces sold this week and a third is on hold pending the collector's decision. That same collector also e
body: Two of Sarah's pieces sold this week and a third is on hold pending the collector's decision. That same collector also emailed asking about install height for the large wave panel since her ceilings are lower than ours. Can you weigh in before I reply?

subject: Re: Water Memory - sales update
snippet: Approve the hold, let's give her until Friday. Tell her our standard sightline is 60 inches to center but the panel can
body: Approve the hold, let's give her until Friday. Tell her our standard sightline is 60 inches to center but the panel can flex a few inches either way. I'll stop by after my studio day Monday to look at the bracket specs myself.

subject: Re: Water Memory - sales update
snippet: Sent her the bracket dimensions, she's happy and moving forward. Separately, Helen Whitfield called asking about a priva
body: Sent her the bracket dimensions, she's happy and moving forward. Separately, Helen Whitfield called asking about a private studio visit to see progress on the Vessel as Landscape pieces before Santa Fe. She's hoping for sometime next week.

subject: Re: Water Memory - sales update
snippet: Let's do next Thursday afternoon for Helen, she's earned a first look. Loop Marcus in so the studio's presentable and th
body: Let's do next Thursday afternoon for Helen, she's earned a first look. Loop Marcus in so the studio's presentable and the newest coil piece is out of the damp room by then.

subject: Fourth of July plans
snippet: I'm hoping we can all get together for the Fourth, Elena and Kai are already asking. Would you rather host or come out t
body: I'm hoping we can all get together for the Fourth, Elena and Kai are already asking. Would you rather host or come out to South Valley this year? Let me know so I can plan the cooking.

subject: Re: Fourth of July plans
snippet: I can host at the gallery courtyard, it's shady and Kai loves running around the sculpture garden. I do have a kiln firi
body: I can host at the gallery courtyard, it's shady and Kai loves running around the sculpture garden. I do have a kiln firing that week so I need to check the schedule before I commit to a date. I'll confirm by Monday.

subject: Re: Fourth of July plans
snippet: Courtyard sounds lovely, that's settled then in my mind. I'll bring my cornbread, it wouldn't be the Fourth without it.
body: Courtyard sounds lovely, that's settled then in my mind. I'll bring my cornbread, it wouldn't be the Fourth without it. What else should I plan on bringing?

subject: Re: Fourth of July plans
snippet: Cornbread is non-negotiable, thank you. I'll do carne asada on the grill and ask Sofia to handle drinks and ice. Should
body: Cornbread is non-negotiable, thank you. I'll do carne asada on the grill and ask Sofia to handle drinks and ice. Should be a good one.

subject: Re: Fourth of July plans
snippet: Wonderful, we're all looking forward to it. Kai asked again yesterday if he gets to see 'Aunt Kristy's clay' when we com
body: Wonderful, we're all looking forward to it. Kai asked again yesterday if he gets to see 'Aunt Kristy's clay' when we come, I told him absolutely.

subject: Dad's knee is doing great
snippet: Your father finished his physical therapy session today and walked to the car without the cane for the first time. He's
body: Your father finished his physical therapy session today and walked to the car without the cane for the first time. He's thrilled and honestly a little smug about it. Wanted you to know since you asked last week.

subject: Re: Dad's knee is doing great
snippet: That's fantastic news, tell him I'm proud of him. I'd love to take him for coffee at Mesa Morning soon now that he's ste
body: That's fantastic news, tell him I'm proud of him. I'd love to take him for coffee at Mesa Morning soon now that he's steadier on his feet. I'll call this weekend to set a date.

subject: Santa Fe museum dates
snippet: I want to book a hotel early for your show at the Southwest Arts Museum since October fills up fast in Santa Fe. Can you
body: I want to book a hotel early for your show at the Southwest Arts Museum since October fills up fast in Santa Fe. Can you send me the exact dates so I know what to reserve? Your father is already talking about it.

subject: Re: Santa Fe museum dates
snippet: Private preview is the evening of October 16th, opening night is the 17th. I'll get you and Dad on the family pass list
body: Private preview is the evening of October 16th, opening night is the 17th. I'll get you and Dad on the family pass list so you're not standing in the general line. Book somewhere near the Plaza if you can.

subject: Re: Santa Fe museum dates
snippet: We're thrilled, I already told your father and he teared up a little. Do you know if Ray Mitchell will be there, he was
body: We're thrilled, I already told your father and he teared up a little. Do you know if Ray Mitchell will be there, he was always so kind to you when you were starting out.

subject: Kai's kindergarten graduation!
snippet: I'm attaching photos from Kai's kindergarten graduation this morning, he was so proud in his little cap. Elena says he w
body: I'm attaching photos from Kai's kindergarten graduation this morning, he was so proud in his little cap. Elena says he wore his dinosaur socks under the gown against her wishes. Thought you'd want to see.

subject: Re: Kai's kindergarten graduation!
snippet: He looks so happy, I wish I could have been there but I had a glaze deadline I couldn't move. Tell Elena I want the full
body: He looks so happy, I wish I could have been there but I had a glaze deadline I couldn't move. Tell Elena I want the full story about those dinosaur socks.

subject: Re: Kai's kindergarten graduation!
snippet: No need to explain, we know how it is during show season. Elena got video too, I'll send it your way. Also, are you free
body: No need to explain, we know how it is during show season. Elena got video too, I'll send it your way. Also, are you free for his birthday party in February?

subject: Re: Kai's kindergarten graduation!
snippet: Yes, keep me on the list, I'll clear that day now. I might throw him a little clay dinosaur to match those socks.
body: Yes, keep me on the list, I'll clear that day now. I might throw him a little clay dinosaur to match those socks.

subject: Chile roasting season
snippet: I know it's early but I wanted to ask if we're using the same Hatch farm for the green chile roast again this fall. Thei
body: I know it's early but I wanted to ask if we're using the same Hatch farm for the green chile roast again this fall. Their crop looked especially good on the news last week. Let me know so I can put in our order.

subject: Re: Chile roasting season
snippet: Same farm, absolutely, they've never let us down. I'll coordinate the roaster rental like last year, that smell in the p
body: Same farm, absolutely, they've never let us down. I'll coordinate the roaster rental like last year, that smell in the parking lot is half the point for me.

subject: Re: Chile roasting season
snippet: While cleaning out the hutch I found your grandmother's recipe card for the chile stew, her handwriting and everything.
body: While cleaning out the hutch I found your grandmother's recipe card for the chile stew, her handwriting and everything. I'll scan it so you have your own copy.

subject: Re: Chile roasting season
snippet: Please do, I'd love to frame that for the kitchen. It feels right to have her handwriting somewhere I look every day.
body: Please do, I'd love to frame that for the kitchen. It feels right to have her handwriting somewhere I look every day.

subject: Re: Chile roasting season
snippet: I'll bring the card and the scan both when I drop off the tomatoes Sunday. Careful with the original, it's fragile.
body: I'll bring the card and the scan both when I drop off the tomatoes Sunday. Careful with the original, it's fragile.

subject: You sounded tired
snippet: You sounded worn out on the phone last night and it worried me a little. Please remember your Monday studio days exist f
body: You sounded worn out on the phone last night and it worried me a little. Please remember your Monday studio days exist for a reason, don't let the museum deadline swallow them whole. Get some rest this weekend.

subject: Re: You sounded tired
snippet: I'm okay, I promise, it's just an intense stretch getting the Santa Fe pieces finished. I'm still protecting Monday no m
body: I'm okay, I promise, it's just an intense stretch getting the Santa Fe pieces finished. I'm still protecting Monday no matter what. It'll ease up once the install plan is locked.

subject: Elena's car trouble
snippet: Elena's car broke down on Central this morning and she's stuck without a ride to work. Do you know a good mechanic near
body: Elena's car broke down on Central this morning and she's stuck without a ride to work. Do you know a good mechanic near the gallery you'd trust with it? She's a little panicked about the cost.

subject: Re: Elena's car trouble
snippet: Have her call the shop on Girard that Marcus uses, they're honest and fast. If the repair runs high, tell her to let me
body: Have her call the shop on Girard that Marcus uses, they're honest and fast. If the repair runs high, tell her to let me help cover part of it, don't let her stress about that.

subject: Re: Elena's car trouble
snippet: Thank you, that means so much, Elena was really touched. Turns out it was the starter motor, not too bad in the end. She
body: Thank you, that means so much, Elena was really touched. Turns out it was the starter motor, not too bad in the end. She wanted me to pass along her thanks directly.

subject: Dad's newsletter and birthday
snippet: I'm forwarding the retirement community newsletter, your father's watercolor got mentioned in the art class write-up. Al
body: I'm forwarding the retirement community newsletter, your father's watercolor got mentioned in the art class write-up. Also his birthday is coming up on the 20th and I want to start planning something nice.

subject: Re: Dad's newsletter and birthday
snippet: That's wonderful about his painting, he'll pretend not to care but he will. For his birthday I was thinking of making hi
body: That's wonderful about his painting, he'll pretend not to care but he will. For his birthday I was thinking of making him something in the studio, do you know if he'd like a bowl or a vase better?

subject: Re: Dad's newsletter and birthday
snippet: A bowl, definitely, he still uses the one you made him years ago for his oatmeal every morning. The 20th is a Monday thi
body: A bowl, definitely, he still uses the one you made him years ago for his oatmeal every morning. The 20th is a Monday this year, I know that's your studio day, so no rush.

subject: Re: Dad's newsletter and birthday
snippet: A bowl it is then, I actually just pulled a glaze test that would suit him perfectly. I'll have it finished well before
body: A bowl it is then, I actually just pulled a glaze test that would suit him perfectly. I'll have it finished well before the 20th.

subject: Found your old clay pieces
snippet: While clearing out the garage I found a box of your childhood pinch pots and coil bowls from grade school. Some of them
body: While clearing out the garage I found a box of your childhood pinch pots and coil bowls from grade school. Some of them are wonderfully lopsided. Do you want me to save them or should I let them go?

subject: Re: Found your old clay pieces
snippet: Please save every lopsided one of them, I want to see how far I've come. Those early pinch pots are where all of this st
body: Please save every lopsided one of them, I want to see how far I've come. Those early pinch pots are where all of this started, in a way.

subject: Re: Found your old clay pieces
snippet: I also found photos from your very first ceramics class, you next to that little electric kiln with clay up to your elbo
body: I also found photos from your very first ceramics class, you next to that little electric kiln with clay up to your elbows. I'll scan those too while I'm at it.

subject: Re: Found your old clay pieces
snippet: I would love to see those, thank you for digging them up. I might actually use one in the bio materials for the Southwes
body: I would love to see those, thank you for digging them up. I might actually use one in the bio materials for the Southwest Arts Museum show.

subject: Re: Found your old clay pieces
snippet: I'll bring the whole box and the scanned photos when I come this weekend. Fair warning, there's a very ambitious clay di
body: I'll bring the whole box and the scanned photos when I come this weekend. Fair warning, there's a very ambitious clay dinosaur in there too.

subject: Heat wave this week
snippet: They're calling for a real heat wave the next few days, please be careful on your Bosque runs and drink plenty of water.
body: They're calling for a real heat wave the next few days, please be careful on your Bosque runs and drink plenty of water. Your father worries about you out there in the mornings.

subject: Re: Heat wave this week
snippet: Thanks for the reminder, I've shifted my runs to right at sunrise to beat the worst of it. The studio AC is struggling t
body: Thanks for the reminder, I've shifted my runs to right at sunrise to beat the worst of it. The studio AC is struggling to keep up with the kiln heat too, so I feel it from both sides.

subject: Sunday picnic invite
snippet: We're doing the church picnic again this Sunday if you and Sofia want to join us, there's usually good food and Kai love
body: We're doing the church picnic again this Sunday if you and Sofia want to join us, there's usually good food and Kai loves the games. No pressure if the studio schedule doesn't allow it.

subject: Re: Sunday picnic invite
snippet: I wish I could, but I've got a glaze firing that runs all day Sunday and I can't leave it. We'll try to swing by afterwa
body: I wish I could, but I've got a glaze firing that runs all day Sunday and I can't leave it. We'll try to swing by afterward if the timing works out.

subject: Re: Sunday picnic invite
snippet: Of course, the kiln comes first, we understand completely. I'll save you both a plate in case you make it by later in th
body: Of course, the kiln comes first, we understand completely. I'll save you both a plate in case you make it by later in the day.

subject: Deposit for the ridge-line vessel
snippet: Kristy, I've decided on the tall ridge-line vessel from the new group, the one with the dry ochre rim. Please consider
body: Kristy, I've decided on the tall ridge-line vessel from the new group, the one with the dry ochre rim. Please consider this my commitment. How would you like the deposit handled, and what's the balance due on delivery?

subject: Re: Deposit for the ridge-line vessel
snippet: I'm so glad it's going to you, Helen, that piece has been my favorite of the whole ridge series. Price is 6,800. A 30
body: I'm so glad it's going to you, Helen, that piece has been my favorite of the whole ridge series. Price is 6,800. A 30 percent deposit holds it and the balance is due when you take delivery. Lena will send a proper invoice from the gallery this afternoon.

subject: Re: Deposit for the ridge-line vessel
snippet: Wonderful. I'll wire the deposit tomorrow morning. Would you be willing to hold it in the gallery until after your San
body: Wonderful. I'll wire the deposit tomorrow morning. Would you be willing to hold it in the gallery until after your Santa Fe opening? I'd love for it to be seen in that context first.

subject: Re: Deposit for the ridge-line vessel
snippet: Of course, I'd be honored to keep it in the show and note it as from a private collection. I'll have Lena mark it sold
body: Of course, I'd be honored to keep it in the show and note it as from a private collection. I'll have Lena mark it sold and reserved for post-exhibition pickup. Thank you for trusting the work, it means a great deal.

subject: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
snippet: Dear Kristy, as we lock the fall calendar I need your best estimate of how many finished vessels you'll deliver for th
body: Dear Kristy, as we lock the fall calendar I need your best estimate of how many finished vessels you'll deliver for the October solo show, and which are still in progress. Our design team wants to begin the floor plan and pedestal order by early April.

subject: Re: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
snippet: Hi Diane, my target is fourteen vessels, ten complete and glazed, four in the coil-and-dry stage right now. The four l
body: Hi Diane, my target is fourteen vessels, ten complete and glazed, four in the coil-and-dry stage right now. The four largest need slow bisque firings so I've built in extra weeks. I can have a confirmed final list to you by the last week of March.

subject: Re: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
snippet: That works beautifully. Fourteen gives us a strong rhythm through the west gallery. Please send approximate dimensions
body: That works beautifully. Fourteen gives us a strong rhythm through the west gallery. Please send approximate dimensions and weights when you can, the largest pieces may need reinforced pedestals and I want to order those early.

subject: Re: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
snippet: I'll get you a spreadsheet with heights, footprints, and estimated weights this week. Three of them are over forty inc
body: I'll get you a spreadsheet with heights, footprints, and estimated weights this week. Three of them are over forty inches and quite heavy, so reinforced pedestals are a good call. Delivery and install would be October 16, opening the 17th, as we discussed.

subject: Re: Vessel as Landscape - production timeline
snippet: Perfect. I'll confirm the install crew and lift equipment for the 16th. One more thing, our education team would love
body: Perfect. I'll confirm the install crew and lift equipment for the 16th. One more thing, our education team would love a short artist statement about the landscape source of the forms for the wall text. No rush, sometime in April is fine.

subject: Water Memory - two more sold and a question
snippet: Kristy, thank you again for such a beautiful install. Lena told me two more panels sold this week. When you have a mom
body: Kristy, thank you again for such a beautiful install. Lena told me two more panels sold this week. When you have a moment can we talk about the sales split on the commissioned wave piece, since that one was priced differently from the rest?

subject: Re: Water Memory - two more sold and a question
snippet: So happy for you, Sarah, the show is really connecting with people. The commission stays at the agreed 60/40 in your f
body: So happy for you, Sarah, the show is really connecting with people. The commission stays at the agreed 60/40 in your favor since you sourced that client directly. Everything else is our standard 50/50. I'll have Lena send an updated statement so it's all transparent.

subject: Re: Water Memory - two more sold and a question
snippet: That's more than fair, thank you. I've started sketches for a new series about the Rio Grande in drought, very differe
body: That's more than fair, thank you. I've started sketches for a new series about the Rio Grande in drought, very different palette, lots of cracked-earth texture. Would Modern Edge want first look when they're ready next spring?

subject: Re: Water Memory - two more sold and a question
snippet: Absolutely, first look is yours. The drought idea gives me chills in the best way, it would pair well with my own land
body: Absolutely, first look is yours. The drought idea gives me chills in the best way, it would pair well with my own landscape work. Let's pencil a studio visit once you have three or four pieces resolved.

subject: Order CP-48213 confirmed
snippet: Thank you for your order. 500 lbs B-Mix 5 stoneware, 4 gallons Clear Liner glaze, 2 boxes of assorted underglazes, and
body: Thank you for your order. 500 lbs B-Mix 5 stoneware, 4 gallons Clear Liner glaze, 2 boxes of assorted underglazes, and a replacement kiln shelf are confirmed and shipping to 3409 Central Ave NE. Estimated delivery is 6 to 8 business days via freight.

subject: Re: Order CP-48213 confirmed
snippet: Thanks for the quick turnaround. Please make sure the freight company calls Lena at the gallery before delivery so som
body: Thanks for the quick turnaround. Please make sure the freight company calls Lena at the gallery before delivery so someone is there for the pallet. The last drop-off got left in the alley and I'd rather avoid that with 500 pounds of clay.

subject: Re: Order CP-48213 confirmed
snippet: Noted, we've flagged the account for a call-ahead delivery and added a liftgate at no charge. You should have tracking
body: Noted, we've flagged the account for a call-ahead delivery and added a liftgate at no charge. You should have tracking by Friday. Thanks as always for supporting the studio side of Clay Planet.

subject: Your Blick order has shipped
snippet: Your recent order has shipped: a set of hake brushes, two ribbon tools, a banding wheel, and three sketchbooks. Tracki
body: Your recent order has shipped: a set of hake brushes, two ribbon tools, a banding wheel, and three sketchbooks. Tracking is attached. Thank you for shopping with Blick Art Materials.

subject: Re: Your Blick order has shipped
snippet: Thanks. The banding wheel is a replacement for one that finally gave out after years of use, so I'm glad it's on the w
body: Thanks. The banding wheel is a replacement for one that finally gave out after years of use, so I'm glad it's on the way. Everything else is for the studio workshops we run on Saturdays.

subject: Acquisition interest - Vessel as Landscape
snippet: Dear Ms. Blackwell, I'm the acquisitions coordinator for the Garza Foundation in Denver. Our director saw images of yo
body: Dear Ms. Blackwell, I'm the acquisitions coordinator for the Garza Foundation in Denver. Our director saw images of your ridge and arroyo vessels and is interested in acquiring one for the foundation's permanent collection. Could we arrange a viewing, ideally around your Santa Fe opening?

subject: Re: Acquisition interest - Vessel as Landscape
snippet: Thank you for reaching out, I'd be delighted. Several of the strongest vessels will be on view at the Southwest Arts M
body: Thank you for reaching out, I'd be delighted. Several of the strongest vessels will be on view at the Southwest Arts Museum starting October 17. I'm happy to arrange a private walkthrough during the run, or a studio visit here in Albuquerque before then if that's easier for your director.

subject: Re: Acquisition interest - Vessel as Landscape
snippet: A walkthrough at the museum would be ideal, it lets our director see the work in context. Could you also share a price
body: A walkthrough at the museum would be ideal, it lets our director see the work in context. Could you also share a price range for the largest pieces so we can prepare the acquisition committee ahead of time?

subject: Re: Acquisition interest - Vessel as Landscape
snippet: The largest vessels, over forty inches, are priced between 9,000 and 12,000 depending on scale and glaze. I'll have my
body: The largest vessels, over forty inches, are priced between 9,000 and 12,000 depending on scale and glaze. I'll have my gallery manager Lena Taylor send a formal collection sheet with images, dimensions, and provenance so your committee has everything it needs.

subject: Kiln schedule this week + big coil piece
snippet: Hey Kristy, I loaded the electric kiln with the bisque batch last night, it should be cool by tomorrow afternoon. The
body: Hey Kristy, I loaded the electric kiln with the bisque batch last night, it should be cool by tomorrow afternoon. The big arroyo coil piece has a hairline near the base I want you to look at before we glaze it. Free to swing by the studio Wednesday?

subject: Re: Kiln schedule this week + big coil piece
snippet: Wednesday works, I'll come by after my morning run. If that hairline is only in the slip and not the wall we can proba
body: Wednesday works, I'll come by after my morning run. If that hairline is only in the slip and not the wall we can probably save it with a careful patch and a slow glaze fire. Don't stress, we've rescued worse. Leave it wrapped so it doesn't dry unevenly.

subject: Re: Kiln schedule this week + big coil piece
snippet: Sounds good. I also reserved the gas kiln for the reduction firing next Monday so we can get the ridge vessels their i
body: Sounds good. I also reserved the gas kiln for the reduction firing next Monday so we can get the ridge vessels their iron-rich surface. Want me to mix a fresh batch of the tenmoku or use what's left from last time?

subject: Re: Kiln schedule this week + big coil piece
snippet: Mix fresh, the old bucket has settled hard and I want an even melt on these. Log the cone packs when you load so we ha
body: Mix fresh, the old bucket has settled hard and I want an even melt on these. Log the cone packs when you load so we have a record for the museum pieces. Thanks Marcus, the studio runs so much smoother with you on the firings.

subject: April newsletter draft for your eyes
snippet: Kristy, draft of the April newsletter is ready. Lead story is the Water Memory sales and Sarah's upcoming drought seri
body: Kristy, draft of the April newsletter is ready. Lead story is the Water Memory sales and Sarah's upcoming drought series, second item is your Southwest Arts Museum solo show announcement, and a short note about Saturday studio workshops. Can you read before I schedule the send?

subject: Re: April newsletter draft for your eyes
snippet: Reads well. Two edits, please soften the museum announcement so it doesn't sound like bragging, maybe frame it as a mi
body: Reads well. Two edits, please soften the museum announcement so it doesn't sound like bragging, maybe frame it as a milestone for the whole gallery. And move the workshop note higher, those Saturday sessions are how we find new collectors. Otherwise send it.

subject: Re: April newsletter draft for your eyes
snippet: Done and done. I reworded the museum line to lead with the artist community and put the workshop blurb up top with a p
body: Done and done. I reworded the museum line to lead with the artist community and put the workshop blurb up top with a photo of the wheel. Scheduling it for Thursday morning, which historically gets our best open rate.

subject: Re: April newsletter draft for your eyes
snippet: Perfect, thank you. Add a line at the bottom that we're taking commission inquiries for the winter, we had three peopl
body: Perfect, thank you. Add a line at the bottom that we're taking commission inquiries for the winter, we had three people ask at the last opening and I don't want to lose that momentum.

subject: Bosque wants to borrow one of your early vessels
snippet: Love, wearing my curator hat for a second, our spring group show at Bosque on New Mexico clay traditions would be so m
body: Love, wearing my curator hat for a second, our spring group show at Bosque on New Mexico clay traditions would be so much richer with one of your early coil vessels. Would you lend the tall gray one from 2022? Fully insured, of course. Also, dinner Friday?

subject: Re: Bosque wants to borrow one of your early vessels
snippet: Yes to both, curator and dinner. The gray 2022 vessel would love a night out at the Bosque. Send me the loan agreement
body: Yes to both, curator and dinner. The gray 2022 vessel would love a night out at the Bosque. Send me the loan agreement and insurance value form whenever and I'll sign. And yes, Friday, but let's actually leave the gallery talk at the door this time.

subject: Re: Bosque wants to borrow one of your early vessels
snippet: Deal, no shop talk Friday, I promise to only mildly break it. I'll route the loan paperwork through our registrar next
body: Deal, no shop talk Friday, I promise to only mildly break it. I'll route the loan paperwork through our registrar next week. Thank you, the show's whole clay section leans on your early work as the anchor.

subject: Re: Bosque wants to borrow one of your early vessels
snippet: Happy to anchor anything you're building. I'll wrap the vessel myself so your registrar doesn't have to worry about th
body: Happy to anchor anything you're building. I'll wrap the vessel myself so your registrar doesn't have to worry about the foot ring, it's more fragile than it looks. See you Friday, I'll bring the good wine.

subject: That base crack you mentioned
snippet: Kristy, been thinking about the hairline on your big arroyo piece. On coil work that scale I'd bet it's uneven drying
body: Kristy, been thinking about the hairline on your big arroyo piece. On coil work that scale I'd bet it's uneven drying at the foot, not a wedging fault. Tent it with plastic and let the base catch up to the walls for a week before you even think about bisque. Slow is your friend.

subject: Re: That base crack you mentioned
snippet: That's exactly what I hoped you'd say, Ray. I've had it tented three days and the foot's already firming more evenly.
body: That's exactly what I hoped you'd say, Ray. I've had it tented three days and the foot's already firming more evenly. I keep hearing your voice about patience every time I rush a large form. Thank you for still looking over my shoulder after all these years.

subject: Re: That base crack you mentioned
snippet: Always. And save me a good seat at that Santa Fe opening, I want to see these landscape vessels in person. You're doin
body: Always. And save me a good seat at that Santa Fe opening, I want to see these landscape vessels in person. You're doing the work I always believed you would. Proud of you, kid.

subject: Feature request - fall solo show
snippet: Hello Kristy, Southwest Contemporary would love to run a feature on your Vessel as Landscape solo show at the Southwes
body: Hello Kristy, Southwest Contemporary would love to run a feature on your Vessel as Landscape solo show at the Southwest Arts Museum this fall. We're thinking a studio interview plus photography of your process. Would you be open to a conversation in late spring for our fall issue?

subject: Re: Feature request - fall solo show
snippet: I'd be honored, thank you for thinking of the show. Late spring works well, the studio will be full of finished vessel
body: I'd be honored, thank you for thinking of the show. Late spring works well, the studio will be full of finished vessels then which makes for better photos than empty shelves. I can also connect you with the museum's curator, Diane Castillo, for the exhibition context.

subject: Re: Feature request - fall solo show
snippet: Wonderful. Our photographer will need a couple of hours of natural light, so a morning session would be ideal. I'll se
body: Wonderful. Our photographer will need a couple of hours of natural light, so a morning session would be ideal. I'll send a few interview questions ahead so you can think about the landscape sources you draw from. Thank you, Kristy.

subject: Albuquerque Journal - local artist feature
snippet: Hi Kristy, Teresa Vigil with the Albuquerque Journal arts desk. I'm working on a piece about Nob Hill's arts corridor
body: Hi Kristy, Teresa Vigil with the Albuquerque Journal arts desk. I'm working on a piece about Nob Hill's arts corridor and Modern Edge Gallery keeps coming up. Could I visit the gallery and your studio for a short profile? Our readers love a hometown-makes-good story.

subject: Re: Albuquerque Journal - local artist feature
snippet: Hi Teresa, thank you, I'd welcome that. Modern Edge is very much a Nob Hill story, we've been at 3409 Central for year
body: Hi Teresa, thank you, I'd welcome that. Modern Edge is very much a Nob Hill story, we've been at 3409 Central for years now. I can show you the gallery, and the studio casita out back where the kilns live. Weekday mornings are quietest. Would next week suit you?

subject: Re: Albuquerque Journal - local artist feature
snippet: Next Wednesday morning would be perfect. I'll bring a photographer for the kiln and wheel shots. If any of your repres
body: Next Wednesday morning would be perfect. I'll bring a photographer for the kiln and wheel shots. If any of your represented artists happen to be around, a few words from them about the gallery would round out the piece nicely.

subject: Invitation - New Mexico clay invitational
snippet: Dear Kristy, Desert Rain Gallery in Santa Fe is organizing an invitational of New Mexico ceramic artists and we'd be t
body: Dear Kristy, Desert Rain Gallery in Santa Fe is organizing an invitational of New Mexico ceramic artists and we'd be thrilled to include two of your vessels. The run would be early next year. Would you be open to consigning a pair of the arroyo pieces?

subject: Re: Invitation - New Mexico clay invitational
snippet: Thank you for the invitation, I admire the roster you've been building. I can commit to two arroyo vessels for an earl
body: Thank you for the invitation, I admire the roster you've been building. I can commit to two arroyo vessels for an early-year run, though not the very largest, those are promised to my museum show first. Let's confirm dates once your calendar firms up.

subject: Re: Invitation - New Mexico clay invitational
snippet: Completely understood, the museum comes first. We're looking at a February to March window next year. I'll send a cons
body: Completely understood, the museum comes first. We're looking at a February to March window next year. I'll send a consignment agreement with our standard 50/50 split and insurance terms. So glad to have you in the group.

subject: Consignment agreement - two vessels
snippet: Kristy, attached is the consignment agreement for the two mid-size ridge vessels you're placing with Turquoise Mesa. T
body: Kristy, attached is the consignment agreement for the two mid-size ridge vessels you're placing with Turquoise Mesa. Terms are our usual 55/45 with a 90-day run and full insurance while on our floor. Please review, sign, and we'll schedule pickup.

subject: Re: Consignment agreement - two vessels
snippet: Reviewed and signed, attached. One correction, the taller vessel's insured value should read 4,200 not 3,200, please i
body: Reviewed and signed, attached. One correction, the taller vessel's insured value should read 4,200 not 3,200, please initial that change on your copy too. I can have both crated and ready for your courier by Thursday.

subject: Re: Consignment agreement - two vessels
snippet: Good catch, corrected to 4,200 and initialed. Our courier will come Thursday afternoon. We'll feature both in the fron
body: Good catch, corrected to 4,200 and initialed. Our courier will come Thursday afternoon. We'll feature both in the front window for the first two weeks, they photograph beautifully in our north light.

subject: Studio visit follow-up - representation
snippet: Kristy, it was a pleasure showing you the new bronze and stone pieces. I've been thinking about your offer to represen
body: Kristy, it was a pleasure showing you the new bronze and stone pieces. I've been thinking about your offer to represent my work at Modern Edge and I'd love to move forward. What are the next steps, and how do you like to handle pricing on sculpture?

subject: Re: Studio visit follow-up - representation
snippet: Daniel, I'm thrilled, your work is exactly the kind of grounded, land-rooted sculpture the gallery is built around. Ne
body: Daniel, I'm thrilled, your work is exactly the kind of grounded, land-rooted sculpture the gallery is built around. Next step is a simple representation agreement, then we photograph the work and build your page on modernedgegallery.com. We usually set sculpture pricing together, based on scale, material, and your exhibition history.

subject: Re: Studio visit follow-up - representation
snippet: That all sounds right. I have eleven finished pieces and three in progress. Could we aim to debut them in a small show
body: That all sounds right. I have eleven finished pieces and three in progress. Could we aim to debut them in a small show next year? I'd want to make a few new works specifically for it if there's time.

subject: Re: Studio visit follow-up - representation
snippet: Let's target a spring debut next year, that gives you room to make the new pieces without rushing. I'll have Lena send
body: Let's target a spring debut next year, that gives you room to make the new pieces without rushing. I'll have Lena send the agreement this week and we'll book a photography day once the weather warms. Welcome to Modern Edge, Daniel.

subject: Interested in the small arroyo bowl set
snippet: Hi Kristy, we met at the Water Memory opening, I'm the one who kept circling back to your small arroyo bowls in the ca
body: Hi Kristy, we met at the Water Memory opening, I'm the one who kept circling back to your small arroyo bowls in the case. Are the set of three still available? I'd like to give them to my daughter as a wedding gift and I can leave a deposit today.

subject: Re: Interested in the small arroyo bowl set
snippet: Margaret, so nice to hear from you, and what a thoughtful gift. The set of three is still available at 1,450 for all t
body: Margaret, so nice to hear from you, and what a thoughtful gift. The set of three is still available at 1,450 for all three. A deposit of 400 holds them and I'll wrap each one separately so they travel safely. Lena can take your card over the phone or send an invoice, whichever you prefer.

subject: Re: Interested in the small arroyo bowl set
snippet: An invoice is perfect, please send it to this address. Could you also include a short card describing the clay and gla
body: An invoice is perfect, please send it to this address. Could you also include a short card describing the clay and glaze? My daughter will treasure knowing how they were made. Thank you, these are just beautiful.

subject: Coming up to Santa Fe next weekend
snippet: Kris, David and I are bringing Kai to Santa Fe next weekend for the children's museum, want to meet us for lunch? Kai
body: Kris, David and I are bringing Kai to Santa Fe next weekend for the children's museum, want to meet us for lunch? Kai has been telling everyone his aunt makes giant pots for a real museum. He's not entirely wrong now, is he.

subject: Re: Coming up to Santa Fe next weekend
snippet: Yes please, I'm actually meeting the museum curator that Saturday morning so lunch after would be perfect. Tell Kai th
body: Yes please, I'm actually meeting the museum curator that Saturday morning so lunch after would be perfect. Tell Kai the giant pots are real and he can help me name one someday. There's a good green chile place off the Plaza we can all handle with a five year old.

subject: Re: Coming up to Santa Fe next weekend
snippet: Perfect, we'll meet you after your museum meeting. Kai has already decided the pot should be named Rocky. I take no re
body: Perfect, we'll meet you after your museum meeting. Kai has already decided the pot should be named Rocky. I take no responsibility for this. See you Saturday, and good luck with the curator, you've got this.

subject: Proud of you, kiddo
snippet: Kristy, your mother showed me the letter from the Santa Fe museum. I keep telling the fellows at my watercolor class m
body: Kristy, your mother showed me the letter from the Santa Fe museum. I keep telling the fellows at my watercolor class my daughter is having a real solo show. I even tried a little clay in the community room, made a terrible ashtray, new respect for what you do.

subject: Re: Proud of you, kiddo
snippet: Dad, a terrible ashtray is exactly how all of us start, I promise. I'd love to see it. And I want you and Mom in the f
body: Dad, a terrible ashtray is exactly how all of us start, I promise. I'd love to see it. And I want you and Mom in the front at the opening, October 17. I'll save the seats. Your watercolors are getting good enough that I might have to give you wall space someday.

subject: Re: Proud of you, kiddo
snippet: Ha, we'll see about wall space, I'll stick to painting for the joy of it. Front seats sound wonderful. Your mother's a
body: Ha, we'll see about wall space, I'll stick to painting for the joy of it. Front seats sound wonderful. Your mother's already picked out a dress. We're both so proud we can hardly stand it. Get some rest between now and then.

subject: Appointment reminder - annual physical
snippet: This is a reminder from Rio Grande Medical Associates that you have an annual physical with Dr. James Patel. Please ar
body: This is a reminder from Rio Grande Medical Associates that you have an annual physical with Dr. James Patel. Please arrive fifteen minutes early to update your paperwork. Reply CONFIRM or call the office to reschedule.

subject: Re: Appointment reminder - annual physical
snippet: Confirming, I'll be there. Please note I've had some wrist soreness from long throwing sessions at the wheel, I'd like
body: Confirming, I'll be there. Please note I've had some wrist soreness from long throwing sessions at the wheel, I'd like to mention it to Dr. Patel while I'm in. Thank you.

subject: Condition reports and insurance values
snippet: Hello Kristy, I'm Paul Nakai, registrar at the Southwest Arts Museum, handling the logistics for your October show. I'
body: Hello Kristy, I'm Paul Nakai, registrar at the Southwest Arts Museum, handling the logistics for your October show. I'll need a condition report and stated insurance value for each of the fourteen vessels before intake. Diane sent your dimensions sheet, this just adds the paperwork side.

subject: Re: Condition reports and insurance values
snippet: Hi Paul, glad to help make intake smooth. I'll photograph each vessel front and back, note any glaze pooling or intent
body: Hi Paul, glad to help make intake smooth. I'll photograph each vessel front and back, note any glaze pooling or intentional surface marks so they're not mistaken for damage, and list insurance values. Most fall between 4,000 and 12,000. I'll send the packet as a single PDF by the end of May.

subject: Re: Condition reports and insurance values
snippet: Perfect, that level of detail is exactly what we want, the intentional-marks note especially. For the three largest, p
body: Perfect, that level of detail is exactly what we want, the intentional-marks note especially. For the three largest, please indicate lift points, our crew wants to know where it's safe to bear weight. We'll provide custom foam cradles for transit.

subject: Re: Condition reports and insurance values
snippet: Will do, I'll mark safe lift points at the shoulder and foot ring on the big three and include a small diagram. Delive
body: Will do, I'll mark safe lift points at the shoulder and foot ring on the big three and include a small diagram. Delivery on October 16, I'll bring them myself in the Tacoma with padding, and hand them to your crew for the cradles. See you then.

subject: Re: Condition reports and insurance values - intake day
snippet: Kristy, intake is all set for the morning of October 16. Pull up to the loading dock on the north side and my team wil
body: Kristy, intake is all set for the morning of October 16. Pull up to the loading dock on the north side and my team will meet you. Condition reports received and countersigned, everything's in order. Looking forward to seeing the vessels in person.

subject: Water Memory closing plans
snippet: Kristy, hard to believe the show's nearly done, it's been such a good run. What's the plan for deinstall and returning
body: Kristy, hard to believe the show's nearly done, it's been such a good run. What's the plan for deinstall and returning the unsold panels? I have two of them promised to a group show up north early next year so I'll need those back in good time.

subject: Re: Water Memory closing plans
snippet: It flew by. We'll deinstall the Monday after closing, Marcus and I will wrap everything and I'll have your unsold pane
body: It flew by. We'll deinstall the Monday after closing, Marcus and I will wrap everything and I'll have your unsold panels crated and ready that week. The two headed north I'll pack separately with extra corner protection. Final sales statement will follow within a few days.

subject: Re: Water Memory closing plans
snippet: Thank you, you make the business side painless. It's meant a lot to show with a gallery that actually cares about the
body: Thank you, you make the business side painless. It's meant a lot to show with a gallery that actually cares about the work. Let's toast when I come to pick up the panels, and I want to hear all about your museum show prep.

subject: Opening night run of show
snippet: Kristy, we're a few days out and everything looks stunning in the west gallery. For opening night on the 17th, we'll d
body: Kristy, we're a few days out and everything looks stunning in the west gallery. For opening night on the 17th, we'll do brief remarks at 6, I'd love five minutes from you about the landscape sources, then open the floor. Press preview is the afternoon of the 16th. Anything you need from us?

subject: Re: Opening night run of show
snippet: Diane, it's a dream to see it come together. Five minutes is perfect, I'll speak to the arroyos and ridgelines the for
body: Diane, it's a dream to see it come together. Five minutes is perfect, I'll speak to the arroyos and ridgelines the forms come from. For the press preview I'll be there by two. Could we have a small table where I can leave a stack of the gallery cards and the Southwest Contemporary feature?

subject: Re: Opening night run of show
snippet: Absolutely, we'll set a table near the entrance with your cards and the magazine. Our director is also hoping to intro
body: Absolutely, we'll set a table near the entrance with your cards and the magazine. Our director is also hoping to introduce you to a few patrons, including the Garza Foundation people, who've asked specifically. It's going to be a wonderful night.

subject: Re: Opening night run of show
snippet: That's wonderful, the Garza coordinator has already been in touch about a walkthrough, so this is perfect timing. I'll
body: That's wonderful, the Garza coordinator has already been in touch about a walkthrough, so this is perfect timing. I'll bring my family too, they've waited a long time for this one. Thank you for making it feel so held, Diane. See you on the 16th.

subject: So looking forward to Santa Fe
snippet: Kristy, I have my hotel near the Plaza booked and I'll be at both the preview and the opening. May I bring a friend wh
body: Kristy, I have my hotel near the Plaza booked and I'll be at both the preview and the opening. May I bring a friend who collects Southwestern ceramics? She's been asking to meet you since she saw the ridge-line vessel photos. And where will my piece be placed?

subject: Re: So looking forward to Santa Fe
snippet: Helen, please do bring your friend, I'd love to meet a fellow admirer of the work. Your ridge-line vessel has a place
body: Helen, please do bring your friend, I'd love to meet a fellow admirer of the work. Your ridge-line vessel has a place of honor near the center of the west gallery with a card noting it's from a private collection. Come find me at the preview and I'll walk you both through the whole series.

subject: Re: So looking forward to Santa Fe
snippet: That's more than I hoped for, thank you. We'll be at the preview by three. I've watched this work grow for two years a
body: That's more than I hoped for, thank you. We'll be at the preview by three. I've watched this work grow for two years and to see it in a museum finally is deeply moving. You've earned every bit of this, Kristy.

subject: Acquisition confirmed - the large ridge vessel
snippet: Dear Kristy, following the walkthrough our committee has approved acquisition of the large ridge vessel, the 44-inch p
body: Dear Kristy, following the walkthrough our committee has approved acquisition of the large ridge vessel, the 44-inch piece in the reduction-fired iron glaze, for the Garza Foundation permanent collection at the agreed 11,500. Please have your gallery send the invoice and provenance documents.

subject: Re: Acquisition confirmed - the large ridge vessel
snippet: This is wonderful news, thank you and please thank your committee. Lena will send the invoice, a signed certificate of
body: This is wonderful news, thank you and please thank your committee. Lena will send the invoice, a signed certificate of authenticity, and the full provenance and firing notes this week. We can coordinate crating and shipping to Denver once the museum show closes in early January.

subject: Re: Acquisition confirmed - the large ridge vessel
snippet: Perfect, a January hand-off works well for our installation schedule. Our director is delighted, she called it the str
body: Perfect, a January hand-off works well for our installation schedule. Our director is delighted, she called it the strongest contemporary vessel we've acquired in years. We look forward to a long relationship with you and Modern Edge.

subject: Planning the spring slate
snippet: Kristy, with the museum show up and running we should lock the spring calendar. I'm thinking Daniel Yazzie's sculpture
body: Kristy, with the museum show up and running we should lock the spring calendar. I'm thinking Daniel Yazzie's sculpture debut in March and maybe a two-person clay show after. Also, three commission inquiries came in from the opening buzz. Want to sit down next week?

subject: Re: Planning the spring slate
snippet: Yes, let's map it Tuesday. Daniel's debut in March feels right, he'll have the new pieces ready. Let's keep April ligh
body: Yes, let's map it Tuesday. Daniel's debut in March feels right, he'll have the new pieces ready. Let's keep April lighter so I can breathe after the museum run. Send me the three commission inquiries, I'll call each one myself, they deserve a personal touch.

subject: Re: Planning the spring slate
snippet: Tuesday it is, I'll bring the calendar and the inquiry notes. One of the commissions is a hotel lobby in Santa Fe that
body: Tuesday it is, I'll bring the calendar and the inquiry notes. One of the commissions is a hotel lobby in Santa Fe that wants three large vessels, could be significant. I'll have the details ready so we can decide if the timeline is realistic with your studio load.

subject: Order CP-51907 confirmed
snippet: Thank you for your reorder. 750 lbs B-Mix 5, 6 gallons Clear Liner, a fresh bag of red iron oxide, and two kiln shelve
body: Thank you for your reorder. 750 lbs B-Mix 5, 6 gallons Clear Liner, a fresh bag of red iron oxide, and two kiln shelves confirmed for delivery to 3409 Central Ave NE. Call-ahead delivery is flagged on your account. Estimated arrival 6 to 8 business days.

subject: Re: Order CP-51907 confirmed
snippet: Thanks, this restocks the studio after a heavy museum-prep year. Same as before, please have freight call Lena before
body: Thanks, this restocks the studio after a heavy museum-prep year. Same as before, please have freight call Lena before the pallet arrives. The red iron oxide is for a new reduction glaze I'm testing over the winter.

subject: After the opening, let's disappear for a few days
snippet: Love, once the opening dust settles I think we've earned a few quiet days. What if we drive up to Taos, no galleries,
body: Love, once the opening dust settles I think we've earned a few quiet days. What if we drive up to Taos, no galleries, no museums, just hot springs and long dinners? You've been holding your breath since February. Let's exhale.

subject: Re: After the opening, let's disappear for a few days
snippet: Taos, yes, please. No sketchbooks, no clay talk, I promise to leave the studio in Marcus's capable hands. I keep dream
body: Taos, yes, please. No sketchbooks, no clay talk, I promise to leave the studio in Marcus's capable hands. I keep dreaming in glaze surfaces lately, I could use a few mornings that aren't about firing schedules. Book us somewhere with a view of the mountains.

subject: Re: After the opening, let's disappear for a few days
snippet: Done, three nights, mountain view, and a soaking pool. I'm so proud of you I could burst, but I'll save the toast for
body: Done, three nights, mountain view, and a soaking pool. I'm so proud of you I could burst, but I'll save the toast for when we're actually up there. You did the thing you always said you would. Now come rest.
